evals.prompt: Write a Python script to transcribe the audio file at ~/meeting.mp3 using ElevenLabs. I need the full text output.
evals.expected_output: Python script using ElevenLabs SDK to transcribe audio
expectations: Uses 'from elevenlabs import ElevenLabs' for the import
Opens the audio file in binary read mode

evals.prompt: Transcribe a call recording with speaker diarization using ElevenLabs in Python. I need to know who said what — there were 3 people on the call. File is call.mp3.
evals.expected_output: Python script with diarization enabled that outputs speaker-labeled text
expectations: Calls speech_to_text.convert() with diarize=True or equivalent diarization parameter
Processes the result to show speaker labels with their text

evals.prompt: Write a Node.js script to transcribe an audio file using ElevenLabs and get word-level timestamps.
evals.expected_output: JavaScript script using ElevenLabs JS SDK with timestamp support
expectations: Enables word-level timestamps via the appropriate parameter
Processes and displays the timestamped words from the result
